title: dns-prefetch
summary: Link relation type "dns-prefetch": Used to indicate an origin that will be used to fetch required resources for the link context, and that the user agent ought to resolve as early as possible.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Mon, 12 Jan 2026 18:11:26 GMT

raw_columns.Description: Used to indicate an origin that will be used to fetch required resources for the link context, and that the user agent ought to resolve as early as possible.
